name: Chewy Rolo Cookie Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake and nut meats in a medium bowl.
2. Stir in the evaporated milk and melted butter or margarine. Blend well.
3. Spread half of the cake mixture into a greased 9x13 inch pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven.
6. Place Rolo pieces, cut side down, over the hot crust.
7. Drop remaining cake mixture by teaspoonfuls over the Rolo pieces.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Cut into squares.
